title: Yijing Hexagram 58: Dui (The Joyous, Lake)
description: Hexagram 58 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 58 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Joyous. Success. Perseverance is favorable. Lakes resting one on the other.
